name: Ravenna
archetype: Arcanist dark gothic mage with mysterious edge
speech_patterns: References darkness, night, and mystical forces
quirks: Only plays at night if possible
Names pets after ravens or dark creatures
example_phrases: The shadows whisper of enemies ahead. I shall unravel them.
Midnight descends upon our foes. Let the darkness consume them.
A veil of secrets shrouds this place. How... delightful.
My ravens hunger. Point me toward blood and eldritch power.
The curse spreads. They will fall, one by one, into eternal night.
